Call tools on an external MCP server det: Call tools on an external MCP server deterministically, without an LLM.
The MCP server endpoint, e.g. https://ex: The MCP server endpoint, e.g. https://example.com/mcp
Header carrying the API key, e.g. \"x-ap: Header carrying the API key, e.g. "x-api-key". Used when Authentication is "API Key".
A JSON object of header name/value pairs: A JSON object of header name/value pairs, e.g. {"x-tenant": "acme"}. Used when Authentication is "Custom Headers".
Connect to an external MCP server. Fill: Connect to an external MCP server. Fill only the fields relevant to the chosen authentication method.
Invoke a specific tool on an external MC: Invoke a specific tool on an external MCP server and return its result.
The tool to call. The list is loaded fro: The tool to call. The list is loaded from the MCP server.
